scripts.dev: concurrently -n db,api,app -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n db,api,app,analysis -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev:db" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:analysis"
scripts.analysis:setup: cd analysis && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
